channel.title: Introducing Statistical Mechanics on Andreas Neophytou
channel.description: Recent content in Introducing Statistical Mechanics on Andreas Neophytou

item.title: Entropy and Maximal Multiplicity
item.description: Chance What do probabilities describe? Michael Bulmer calls these the the two concepts of probability in his very carefully and well written book.1 There are Probabilities describe incomplete knowledge, we don’t know for certain whether it will rain tomorrow but we know the chance it will. $$S = k_{\text{B}}\ln(\Omega)$$ Michael G. Bulmer. (1979). Principles of statistics. Courier Corporation. ^

item.title: History of Thermodynamics
item.description: Probability theory deals with quantities and events that are distributed randomly and shows how to calculate average values of various kinds.

item.title: The Basics
Zeroth Law
item.description: Probability theory deals with quantities and events that are distributed randomly and shows how to calculate average values of various kinds.
